text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having declared that she'll beat Tokai Teio, Nice
Nature is filled with instant regret and screams
her frustrations into a hollow stump.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing her beside herself with anxiety, I express
my deep support for her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Realizing she's got me and the whole shopping
district backing her, she decides she needs to
stop whining and pulls herself together.
